title: Contributor Code of Conduct
text: contributors maintainers project, pledge respect people contribute reporting issues, posting feature requests, updating documentation, submitting pull requests patches, activities. committed making participation project harassment-free experience everyone, regardless level experience, gender, gender identity expression, sexual orientation, disability, personal appearance, body size, race, ethnicity, age, religion. Examples unacceptable behavior participants include use sexual language imagery, derogatory comments personal attacks, trolling, public private harassment, insults, unprofessional conduct. Project maintainers right responsibility remove, edit, reject comments, commits, code, wiki edits, issues, contributions aligned Code Conduct. Project maintainers follow Code Conduct may removed project team. Instances abusive, harassing, otherwise unacceptable behavior may reported opening issue contacting one project maintainers. Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant (https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 1.0.0, available https://contributor-covenant.org/version/1/0/0/.

what: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegMars
title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegMars
text: ggseg 2.0 atlas package providing brain atlas data ggseg ecosystem. data-package custom functions.

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegMars
text: data/*.rda — Unified ggseg_atlas objects (2D + 3D one object) R/data.R — Roxygen2 documentation atlas R/ggsegMars-package.R — Package-level docs, imports ggseg.formats data-raw/ — Scripts generated/converted atlas data

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegMars
text: package depends ggseg.formats provides ggseg_atlas class. atlas objects work ggseg::geom_brain() (2D) ggseg3d::ggseg3d() (3D).

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegMars
text: Update docs: devtools::document() Run tests: devtools::test() (testthat edition 3, describe/style) Full check: devtools::check() Build pkgdown site: pkgdown::build_site()

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegMars
text: code comments except necessary workarounds Roxygen2 markdown enabled Tests use describe/BDD style vdiffr visual regression NEWS.md tracks user-facing changes (CI/pkgdown changes) URLs point ggseg GitHub org (LCBC-UiO)

what: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation for the ggseg Ecosystem
title: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: Work Progress – package active development yet officially released. MarsAtlas cortical parcellation ggseg ecosystem.

title: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: recommend installing ggseg-atlases ggseg r-universe: can install package GitHub :
code: options(repos = c(   ggseg = "https://ggseg.r-universe.dev",   CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org" ))  install.packages("ggsegMars") # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("ggseg/ggsegMars")

title: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation for the ggseg Ecosystem
code: library(ggseg) library(ggsegMars) library(ggplot2)  ggplot() +   geom_brain(     atlas = marsatlas_cortical(),     mapping = aes(fill = label),     position = position_brain(hemi ~ view),     show.legend = FALSE   ) +   scale_fill_manual(values = marsatlas_cortical()$palette, na.value = "grey") +   theme_void() +   ggtitle("MarsAtlas cortical parcellation")

title: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation for the ggseg Ecosystem
code: ggplot() +   geom_brain(     atlas = marsatlas_subcortical(),     mapping = aes(fill = label),     position = position_brain(. ~ view),     show.legend = FALSE   ) +   scale_fill_manual(values = marsatlas_subcortical()$palette, na.value = "grey") +   theme_void() +   ggtitle("MarsAtlas subcortical structures")

title: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: Auzias G, Coulon O, Brovelli (2016). MarsAtlas: cortical parcellation atlas functional mapping. Human Brain Mapping, 37(4), 1573-1592.

what: ggsegMars: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegMars-package
title: ggsegMars: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegMars-package
text: MarsAtlas cortical parcellation based macroanatomical information 41 regions per hemisphere 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' object 2D polygon geometry 3D vertex indices, use 'ggseg' 'ggseg3d'.

title: ggsegMars: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegMars-package
text: Maintainer: Athanasia Mo Mowinckel .m.mowinckel@psykologi.uio.(ORCID)

title: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation — marsatlas_cortical
text: Cortical parcellation based macroanatomical information Auzias et al. (2016), 41 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation — marsatlas_cortical
text: ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

title: MarsAtlas Cortical Parcellation — marsatlas_cortical
text: Auzias G, Coulon O, Brovelli (2016). MarsAtlas: cortical parcellation atlas functional mapping. doi:10.1002/hbm.23121

code: marsatlas_cortical() #> Error in marsatlas_cortical(): object '.marsatlas_cortical' not found

title: MarsAtlas Subcortical Structures — marsatlas_subcortical
text: Subcortical structures MarsAtlas parcellation. Contains 2D polygon geometry 3D meshes.

text: Initial release marsatlas_cortical marsatlas_subcortical atlases unified ggseg_atlas objects ggseg 2.0 ecosystem.
